items.title: World's rules-based order 'no longer exists', Germany's Merz warns
items.dek: "Our freedom is not guaranteed" in an era of big powers, the German chancellor tells Munich's security summit.
items.body: "Our freedom is not guaranteed" in an era of big powers, the German chancellor tells Munich's security summit.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukrainian slider still banned as helmet appeal dismissed
items.dek: Ukrainian skeleton racer Vladyslav Heraskevych will not compete at the Winter Olympics after the Court of Arbitration for Sport dismissed his appeal to wear a h
items.body: Ukrainian skeleton racer Vladyslav Heraskevych will not compete at the Winter Olympics after the Court of Arbitration for Sport dismissed his appeal to wear a helmet depicting images of athletes killed during Russia's invasion of his home country.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Head of Dubai-based ports giant quits after Epstein links revealed
items.dek: Sultan Ahmed bin Sulayem’s exit comes after files showed he appears to have exchanged hundreds of emails with Epstein.
items.body: Sultan Ahmed bin Sulayem’s exit comes after files showed he appears to have exchanged hundreds of emails with Epstein.
items.author: IriLine Desk
